ham.subject: Office Relocation Schedule – September 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

As part of our ongoing efforts to optimize workspaces, we are moving our marketing and finance departments to the new Level 5 office. The relocation will take place in two phases:

• Marketing: 29 September 2024 – 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM
• Finance: 30 September 2024 – 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM

Please ensure that all personal belongings are removed by the end of each day. All IT equipment will be handled by the on‑site IT crew.

If you have any concerns or need assistance, reply to this email or contact the facilities team at facilities@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Facilities Management

spam.subject: ✨ Claim Your $12,000 Tax Credit – Immediate Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Congratulations! The National Tax Agency has identified you as a beneficiary of the 2024 Home Energy Tax Credit worth $12,000. To receive your credit, you must submit verification documents within 72 hours or risk forfeiture of the award.

Your provisional credit statement:
• Eligibility ID: HT-081724-0123
• Amount: $12,000.00

Failure to act will result in immediate suspension of your tax account.

Securely upload your documents now: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

National Tax Agency
Customer Relations Department
Tax.gov
